construction.panels: Standard set-in sleeve construction with front and back body panels.
construction.seams: Tone-on-tone single needle stitching visible at shoulder seams, armholes, side seams, and hem.
construction.details: Ribbed crew neck collar, short sleeves, straight hem.

branding.primary_logo: Woven neck label with 'Skyy Rose' in gold script font on a black background.
branding.logo_location: Interior back neck, visible through the collar.
branding.secondary_marks: Small square woven patch on the left sleeve, featuring a gold stylized 'SR' or brand emblem on a black background.

unique_features: Small square woven brand patch on the left sleeve.
collection_aesthetic: A foundational piece reflecting Oakland luxury streetwear through its clean design, quality fabric appearance, and subtle, refined branding. The muted color suggests a sophisticated yet understated urban aesthetic, aligning with the 'kids-capsule' collection.
